name: Jensen Huang
title: President and Chief Executive Officer
description: Co-founder of NVIDIA who leads the company's overall strategic direction, operations, and vision as its top executive.

name: Colette Kress
title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
description: Oversees NVIDIA's financial operations, reporting, planning, and investor relations.

name: Ajay Puri
title: Executive Vice President, Worldwide Field Operations
description: Leads NVIDIA's global sales and field operations across all regions and market segments.

name: Debora Shoquist
title: Executive Vice President, Operations
description: Responsible for NVIDIA's global operations including supply chain, manufacturing, and facilities.

name: Timothy Teter
title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary
description: Oversees NVIDIA's legal affairs, corporate governance, intellectual property, and regulatory matters.

name: Chris Malachowsky
title: Fellow
description: Co-founder of NVIDIA serving as a technical Fellow, contributing to long-term engineering and research strategy.

name: Jeff Fisher
title: Senior Vice President, GeForce
description: Leads NVIDIA's GeForce gaming business, including GPU products and gaming platform strategy.

name: Bill Dally
title: Senior Vice President and Chief Scientist
description: Directs NVIDIA Research and guides the company's long-term scientific and technical research initiatives.

name: Jay Puri
title: Executive Vice President, Worldwide Field Operations
description: Drives NVIDIA's global go-to-market strategy and enterprise customer engagements worldwide.

name: Manuvir Das
title: Vice President, Enterprise Computing
description: Leads NVIDIA's enterprise computing strategy and oversees the expansion of AI and accelerated computing in enterprise markets.
